attribution.txdot: Traffic cameras: TxDOT (Lonestar/DriveTexas + ITS district snapshots); imagery not recorded
attribution.river: River cameras: USGS HIVIS (public domain, provisional imagery)
attribution.austin: Traffic cameras: City of Austin, Texas (public domain); imagery not recorded
attribution.atxfloods: Flood cameras: ATX Floods / City of Austin low-water crossings
attribution.houston: Traffic cameras: Houston TranStar (Houston region incl. Galveston/Bolivar ferry)
attribution.arlington: Traffic cameras: City of Arlington, Texas (public arterial cams)
attribution.elpbridge: Live cameras: City of El Paso — international bridges
